added.description: Steve profiles Stan for an essay contest at school; Francine uses a porta john.
added.title: A League of His Own

added.description: Hoping to teach him the value of sharing, the family recreates a television show from Klaus's childhood. Roger has a piano recital.
added.title: Gernot and Strudel

added.description: Stan is forced to co-lead a scouts troop with Hayley while Steve blunders in his fantasy world.
added.title: Hayley Was a Girl Scout?

added.description: Barry blows out his dad's speakers and Snot helps him replace them. Stan attempts to do a standing backflip.

input: I Heard You Wanna Buy Some Speakers
Heard You Wanna Buy Some Speakers

added.title: I Heard You Wanna Buy Some Speakers

added.description: When Francine successfully grows a garden, it reminds Roger he knows a recipe for truly authentic jambalaya.
added.title: Jambalaya

added.description: Jeff's people pleasing nature gets in the way of his relationship with Hayley; Stan wears a confusing costume to the CIA costume party.
added.title: Please Please Jeff

added.description: To save their marriage, Jeff needs Hayley to open up more to him, but she wants no part in it.
added.title: Pork 'N Feelings

added.description: Steve goes on a class trip to Philadelphia, where he hopes to fall in love.
added.title: Smooshed: A Love Story

added.description: Roger is forced to confront himself after a series of accidents. Klaus and Jeff bond.
added.title: The Fast and the Spurious

added.description: Francine's newfound friendship with a frog brings excitement to the whole Smith household. Unfortunately, it drives their neighbor, Greg, crazy.
added.title: The Three Fs

added.description: Roger and Steve try to save a dying mall.
added.title: You Are Here

added.description: The family gets invited to Rudy's father's birthday party.
added.title: The Big Stieblitzki

added.description: Dogstorm and Cat Viper recall their journey with Oden and Roger, but Nami's concern interrupts their tale.

input: The Legendary Journey! The Dog and the Cat and the Pirate King!
Legendary Journey! The Dog and the Cat and the Pirate King!

The Dog and the Cat and the Pirate King!
Dog and the Cat and the Pirate King!
and the Cat and the Pirate King!
the Cat and the Pirate King!

removed.description: When Louise signs up for a father-daughter boogie board contest, Bob's past comes back to haunt him.
removed.title: Boogie Days

removed.description: Stan becomes the laughing stock of Langley Falls after he defecates in a swimming pool during a party.
removed.title: An Incident at Owl Creek

removed.description: Klaus and Jeff's friendship is threatened by Klaus's girlfriend from another realm.
removed.title: The Pleasanting at Smith House

removed.description: Francine insists that Steve let her help with his school project, Stan finally fixes that shingle, and the rest of the family goes on a quest to return Gallagher's mallet.
removed.title: Stan Fixes a Shingle

removed.description: The judgmental voice in Hayley's head makes it impossible for her to enjoy a girls' night with Nerfer and Danuta.
removed.title: Cow I Met Your Moo-ther

removed.description: When Stan discovers anonymous love letters written to Francine, he worries that this secret admirer could threaten their relationship.
removed.title: Better on Paper

removed.description: When Jeff finds out that the family thinks he makes terrible decisions, he decides to take a job selling stretchy leggings to prove them wrong.
removed.title: Stretched Thin

removed.description: Steve starts a work-study program and discovers that not all is what it seems at Channel 3 News. Roger seeks redemption in the Nashville country music scene.
removed.title: Echoes

removed.description: When Roger has his famous Christmas sex party stolen from him the results are... monstrous. Stan creates a magazine for men.
removed.title: The Grounch

removed.description: Hayley tries to help Roger write a book.
removed.title: The Professor and the Coach

removed.description: Steve and Principal Lewis get caught in a dangerous situation at the school; the rest of the family makes an adorable new friend.

removed.description: A lunar misstep sends Roger on an unexpected detour to New Mexico.
removed.title: Fellow Traveler
